appraisal_events.evidence: Des hommes vinrent au balcon se suspendre à sa main pour approcher le cercle imposant dont elle était environnée... les cartes cornées pleuvaient chez Odette... Préférer Odette, c’était montrer qu’on était intelligent.
appraisal_events.explanation: The scene highlights Odette as a center of worldly and intellectual attraction; being in her company becomes a sign of distinction, bringing about a visible increase in her social consideration.

status_effects.explanation: She appears as a sought-after and validating pole, attracting men and invitations; her preference becomes a marker of intelligence.
